skills.name: dataset-onboard
skills.purpose: Scan data/raw, load supported files into DuckDB, emit schema profiles and source hashes.

skills.name: vendor-concentration
skills.purpose: Find top vendor share by category or department using replayable SQL.

skills.name: amendment-creep
skills.purpose: Find contracts where current value is materially larger than original value.

skills.name: related-parties
skills.purpose: Find people appearing across multiple organizations in loaded files.

skills.name: adverse-media
skills.purpose: Attach cited external signals only after source discipline is in place.

skills.name: correlate
skills.purpose: Rank entities by independent challenge signals.

skills.name: verify
skills.purpose: Replay every saved SQL query and mark findings as reproducible or not.

skills.name: promote
skills.purpose: Write investigation, dataset sources, and findings into the local Neotoma ledger.
